notes: Game loaded initial logo then hard crashed and locked up entire computer, requiring a full restart to resolve.
title: ADR1FT

notes:
First launch resulted in a black screen. Second launch displayed a number of technology and engine logos, then ended in a white screen with black window where it plays audio of what I believe is Three One Zero's developer intro. If user launches with the PROTON_USE_WINED3D, the screen is instead all white, but appears to get stuck on the same intro.

I've attempted to launch it with 4.11-3, 4.2.9 and 3.16.9 and with FSYNC, ESYNC  	PROTON_USE_WINED3D and Large Address Aware with no change.
title: ADR1FT
